summary: First-finish smoke test for Gaurav Malik 3D portfolio. Backend (6 checks) and frontend (contact form + nav + 3D + sections + resume) all working. Emergent Resend integration confirmed via 202 Accepted in logs.
passed: POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 success, MongoDB contact_messages persisted (verified via mongosh count=1)
Emergent Resend: 2x POST integrations.emergentagent.com/api/v1/email/send -> 202 Accepted (owner + visitor ack) verified in backend logs
Resume PDF HEAD /Gaurav_Malik_Resume.pdf -> HTTP/2 200, content-type application/pdf
Frontend loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with 0 pageerrors, 3D canvas rendered
All nav testids present (home/about/skills/projects/achievements/contact/resume) and smooth-scroll to contact works
All 5 hero social hrefs match profile.links exactly
Achievements show LeetCode 1600, GFG 1800, and 2nd place text
Contact form full E2E: fill+submit -> success toast + contact-success-msg='Message received. Talk soon!' + form resets
Empty-field submit does not crash; blocked by native HTML5 required validation
notes: Hero brand logo renders as stylized 'gaurav.malik' (lowercase with dot) rather than literal 'Gaurav Malik' string; visible and intentional per design.
Empty submit is blocked by browser-native HTML5 'required' tooltip rather than a custom error toast/contact-error-msg element — no crash, safe UX.
